Class ImageCache

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.view.gui.screen.ImageCache
public final class ImageCache extends Object
Image cache with automatic fallback to colored placeholders.

Philosophy: UI code always asks for an image given a resource path. If the PNG exists in the resources, it is loaded and cached. If it does not exist (or has not been provided yet), a colored placeholder node with a label is generated. This allows the UI to be developed before the final graphic assets are available: as soon as the file is dropped into src/main/resources/..., it appears in place of the placeholder on the next start, with no code changes.

Path conventions (see resources/images/):

  • /images/cards/{id}.png — front of a card
  • /images/cards/back_*.png — deck backs
  • /images/tiles/tile_X.png — offer tile with letter X
  • /images/icons/{name}.png — resource/totem icons
  • /images/board/{name}.{png|jpg} — backgrounds and turn-order track

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    cardPath(String cardId)
    Card path: /images/cards/card_{id}.png.
    static javafx.scene.paint.Color

    Placeholder color from a color string (e.g.
    static javafx.scene.Node

    Variant for small square icons with label = first character.

    iconPath(String name)
    Generic icon path: /images/icons/icon_{name}.png.
    static String
    inventorIconPath(char icon)
    Path of a specific Inventor icon: /images/icons/InventorIcon_X.png.

    Loads an image from the classpath.

    Returns a node showing the image at the requested size.
    static javafx.scene.Node
    nodeFirst(double w, double h, String fallbackLabel, javafx.scene.paint.Color fallbackColor, String... resourcePaths)
    Variant of node(String, double, double, String, Color) that tries multiple paths in order: the first one that loads wins.
    static javafx.scene.Node
    placeholder(double w, double h, String label, javafx.scene.paint.Color color)
    Creates a colored rectangle with a centered label; used as a fallback.
    static String
    tilePath(char letter)
    Offer tile path: /images/tiles/tile_X.png.
    static javafx.scene.Node
    totemNode(String color, double size, String fallbackLabel)
    Returns a totem node at the requested size, trying .png then .jpg in order, so it is enough to drop the file into the /images/totem/ folder regardless of the extension.
    static String
    totemPath(String color)
    Path of the player's totem image.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • load

      public static javafx.scene.image.Image load(String resourcePath)
      Loads an image from the classpath. Returns null if the file does not exist — the caller must then create a placeholder.

    • node

      public static javafx.scene.Node node(String resourcePath, double w, double h, String fallbackLabel, javafx.scene.paint.Color fallbackColor)
      Returns a node showing the image at the requested size. If the PNG does not exist, a colored placeholder with the given label is returned: dropping in the PNG files makes the UI update by itself.

    • icon

      public static javafx.scene.Node icon(String resourcePath, double size, String fallbackLabel, javafx.scene.paint.Color fallbackColor)
      Variant for small square icons with label = first character.

    • placeholder

      public static javafx.scene.Node placeholder(double w, double h, String label, javafx.scene.paint.Color color)
      Creates a colored rectangle with a centered label; used as a fallback.

    • cardPath

      public static String cardPath(String cardId)
      Card path: /images/cards/card_{id}.png.

    • tilePath

      public static String tilePath(char letter)
      Offer tile path: /images/tiles/tile_X.png.

    • iconPath

      public static String iconPath(String name)
      Generic icon path: /images/icons/icon_{name}.png.

    • inventorIconPath

      public static String inventorIconPath(char icon)
      Path of a specific Inventor icon: /images/icons/InventorIcon_X.png. The file name uses the UPPERCASE letter (A, B, C, ...), so it CANNOT go through iconPath(String), which instead forces lowercase.

    • totemPath

      public static String totemPath(String color)
      Path of the player's totem image. Files live in /images/totem/ named after the lowercase English color (e.g. red.jpg).

    • totemNode

      public static javafx.scene.Node totemNode(String color, double size, String fallbackLabel)
      Returns a totem node at the requested size, trying .png then .jpg in order, so it is enough to drop the file into the /images/totem/ folder regardless of the extension.

    • nodeFirst

      public static javafx.scene.Node nodeFirst(double w, double h, String fallbackLabel, javafx.scene.paint.Color fallbackColor, String... resourcePaths)
      Variant of node(String, double, double, String, Color) that tries multiple paths in order: the first one that loads wins. Useful for assets that may be .png or .jpg (e.g. numplayer_4.jpg).

    • colorFromName

      public static javafx.scene.paint.Color colorFromName(String name)
      Placeholder color from a color string (e.g. "yellow").
